R2: executed_by(tree, 'provide brochures', 'customerAdvisor') and condition_eventually_follows(tree, '(brochuresProvided == true)', 'process continues')
R3: leads_to(tree, 'conclude custodyAccountContract', 'send legitimation and accountDocuments') and executed_by(tree, 'send legitimation and accountDocuments', 'marketSupport')
R4: executed_by(tree, 'conduct investmentAdvice', 'customerAdvisor') and condition_eventually_follows(tree, '(securitiesCompetenceLevel >= "C")', 'conduct investmentAdvice')
R5: executed_by(tree, 'handle customerIdentification and legitimation', 'customerAdvisor') and executed_by(tree, 'check moneyLaunderingCase', 'antiMoneyLaunderingOfficer')
